chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: In our life, we have to repeat some things.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: For example, we cook food daily.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: We do the same thing daily.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes we have to do some work

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: which we do for a given client.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: For example, if your mom gave you a job

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: to fill all these bottles with water and keep them in the fridge,

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: then you will do the work for every bottle.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: In programming, we have to do some work, we have to repeat it.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: For example, keep printing every number.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python

chunks.title: For Loops in Python

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: And you will get tired of writing print 1, print 2, print 3, print 4, print 5.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: I am tired of saying it.

chunks.title: For Loops in Python
chunks.text: So you will want to use loops.
